license_policy: Only copy code from verified compatible free/open-source licenses. Store metadata-only notes for public free sources where a code license file could not be verified. Skip paid, Pro, premium, gated, login-required, marketplace-only, subscription-only, trial-only, and unclear-access sources.

discovered_templates.name: Next.js SaaS Starter by 0xmattthemii
discovered_templates.skill_usage_notes: Use as a free MIT reference for lean production-grade SaaS app structure with Better Auth organizations, Drizzle/Postgres, AI SDK streaming chat, account and organization settings, member invites, workspace switcher, server-first routes, granular Suspense loading, and a shadcn/Tailwind inset sidebar shell. Billing is intentionally not included, so add billing screens from separate verified-free sources when needed.

discovered_templates.name: Next WorkOS Convex Starter
discovered_templates.skill_usage_notes: Use as a free MIT reference for enterprise SaaS/admin portals with hosted WorkOS AuthKit routes, org-scoped workspace routing, first-login onboarding, WorkOS profile/user-management/SSO widgets, server-issued widget tokens, Convex app data, protected admin routes, and Tailwind/shadcn dashboard shells.

discovered_templates.name: SupaNext Starter Kit 2
discovered_templates.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui + Radix primitives
discovered_templates.license_status: Public free README; LICENSE file not found during this run
discovered_templates.skill_usage_notes: Use as metadata and prompt-pattern reference only until a license file is verified. Useful patterns include Supabase SSR auth, public landing routes, protected dashboard redirects, profile settings, project CRUD table scaffolds, Tailwind v4 shadcn UI composition, and auth pages for sign-up/sign-in/forgot-password/update-password. Do not copy source code into reusable skill bundles yet.

skipped_candidates.reason: Appears to duplicate/fork the already-registered Kiranism Next Shadcn Dashboard Starter based on README/license references, so it was not added as a genuinely new template.
README says free/open-source, but no LICENSE file was found during this run. Deferred to avoid adding too many metadata-only commercial-vendor entries without stronger license evidence.
README says free/open-source, but no LICENSE file/package license was found during this run. Deferred to avoid unclear code reuse.
